aeo_readiness.summary: AI assistants are unlikely to cite Pro Heating & Cooling due to a lack of structured content and authority signals, but with improvements, they can become a top recommendation for HVAC queries in Evanston.
quick_wins: Implement FAQ content with structured FAQPage schema.
Add detailed service pages with HowTo schema for common HVAC tasks.

gbp_analysis.summary: Google Business Profile is operational but lacks photos and Q&A engagement, which are critical for AI to recognize the business as active and trustworthy.

nap_citations.summary: NAP consistency is perfect with no issues detected.
action_items: Maintain current NAP consistency across all platforms.

schema_gaps: No HowTo schema for service processes

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of structured data and conversational content makes the site less AI-friendly.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Local HVAC service queries such as 'best HVAC repair in Evanston'.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Adding FAQ content with structured FAQPage schema.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Showcasing certifications, industry partnerships, and detailed case studies to establish expertise.

agency_pitch.hook: Unlock AI-driven leads by making your HVAC services the go-to choice for Evanston residents.
agency_pitch.pain_point: Without AI-ready content and authority signals, you're missing out on 40% of potential leads from AI assistants.
agency_pitch.proof_point: Current website lacks FAQ content and structured schema, which are essential for AI to cite the business.
agency_pitch.solution: Our AEO approach integrates structured data, conversational content, and authority signals to make your business stand out to AI models.
agency_pitch.impact_estimate: Expect a 30-40% increase in AI-driven leads within 3-6 months.
agency_pitch.urgency: Competitors optimizing for AI are already capturing market share—act now to stay ahead.

email_subject_line: Unlock AI-Driven Leads for Your HVAC Business in Evanston
opening_line: We analyzed your website and identified key opportunities to make your HVAC services more visible to AI assistants.
cta: Let's schedule a call to discuss how we can optimize your site for AI and boost your lead generation.
